hero.name: Carlos Henrique
hero.tagline: I build reliable APIs, well-modeled databases and systems that scale — with clean code and real documentation.

about.title: About me
about.text: I'm a Systems Analysis and Development student at Fatec Cruzeiro – Prof. Waldomiro May, focused on back-end development. I'm interested in system architecture, API best practices, and database performance. I'm currently looking for my first internship opportunity to apply what I'm learning in practice.
about.highlight: 1 relevant achievement — e.g.: won a hackathon, published project, teaching assistant

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected projects focused on back-end — architecture, technical decisions and documented code.

items.name: AirGuard
items.description: Air quality monitoring system using IoT, ESP32 and environmental sensors (DHT22, MQ-7, MQ-135) for real-time data collection and visualization. An academic extension project built in partnership with the Cruzeiro-SP Municipal Environment Department, featuring a web dashboard with measurement history, an alert system and monitoring station management.
highlights: Real-time data collection via ESP32 and environmental sensors
Web dashboard with WebSocket and measurement history
Institutional partnership with the Municipal Environment Department

items.name: Cyclic Timer System
items.description: A timing mechanism made of two interdependent timers: a main timer with continuous progressive counting, and an auxiliary timer triggered every 20 seconds by the main one, running for 5 seconds before shutting down automatically. Built as a technical exercise for a Delphi developer position.

items.name: StudyFlow — Acelera Project
items.description: Prototype built for the "Acelera" interdisciplinary project, applying the Brazilian Curricularização da Extensão model to create software with a social impact goal. StudyFlow helps high school seniors study for college entrance exams by offering practice questions with explanations for each answer choice.
highlights: Guided by Data Structures and Programming Languages professors

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Open to internship opportunities. Send me a message!

footer.text: Built with pure HTML, CSS & JS · Hosted on GitHub Pages
